name: 小学英语词汇
description: 小学阶段必备词汇，适合英语入门学习

words.sentence: There are twenty students in our class.
Thirty people came to the meeting.
One hundred is a round number.
We are in the same class.
The girl is reading a book.
I am a student in Class One.
The lion is called the king of animals.
The zebra has black and white stripes.
The giraffe has a very long neck.
The sheep is fluffy and white.
words.sentenceTranslation: 绵羊毛茸茸的，是白色的。

words.sentence: The duck swims in the pond.
The whale is the largest animal.
An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
words.sentenceTranslation: 一天一苹果，医生远离我。

words.sentence: The pear is sweet and soft.
The peach is soft and sweet.
I have an egg for breakfast.
Coffee is popular in the morning.
I like fried chicken very much.
We often eat pork at home.
Fish is good for your health.
Garlic is good for your health.

words.sentenceTranslation: 蘑菇生长在阴暗的地方。
她有一双明亮的大眼睛。

words.sentence: I can hear with my ears.

I have a pain in my back.

We are in the same class.
I read a book every night.
Use a ruler to draw a line.
I carry a bag to school.

words.sentenceTranslation: 篮球是我最喜欢的运动。

words.sentence: The book is on the table.
There is a picture on the wall.

Good afternoon! See you in the afternoon.
I go to school on Monday.
Wednesday is the middle of the week.
Friday is the last school day.
words.sentenceTranslation: 星期五是最后一个上学日。

words.sentence: What do you do on the weekend?
New Year's Day is in January.
April is the month of flowers.
May is a warm and beautiful month.
words.sentenceTranslation: 五月是一个温暖而美丽的月份。

words.sentence: June is the start of summer.
October is the month of Halloween.
What is the weather like today?
It is very hot in summer.
It is very cold in winter.
It is rainy today. Take an umbrella.
The cloud is white and fluffy.
There are many stars in the sky.
I am hungry. Can I have some food?
words.sentenceTranslation: 我饿了。我能吃点东西吗？

words.sentence: I am thirsty. I need some water.
The clever boy solved the problem.
words.sentenceTranslation: 那个聪明的男孩解决了问题。

words.sentence: I am busy with my homework.
I go to school every day.
I walk to school every day.
The frog can jump very high.

I sleep eight hours every night.
I wake up at six every morning.
Put the book on the table.
Take this book to the library.
I want to buy a new pencil.
Ask the teacher if you don't understand.
Don't forget to lock the door.
I can see a bird in the tree.
We are in the same class.
I will go to Beijing tomorrow.
I like fish but I don't like meat.
words.sentenceTranslation: 我喜欢鱼肉但不喜欢肉。

words.sentence: Do you like tea or coffee?
I was late, so I missed the bus.
words.sentenceTranslation: 我迟到了，所以错过了公交车。

words.sentence: I am happy because I got a gift.
words.sentenceTranslation: 我很开心因为我收到了一份礼物。

words.sentence: If it rains, I will stay at home.
words.sentenceTranslation: 如果下雨，我就待在家里。

words.sentence: I will call you after school.
words.sentenceTranslation: 放学后我会打电话给你。

words.sentence: I like this song very much.

words.sentenceTranslation: 我给我的朋友写了一封信。

words.sentence: A circle is a round shape.
